features: ✅【2PCS Set】This set includes 1 black & 1 milky white bow hair clip, with dimensions of 21cm/8.26in * 13cm/5.11in. The large size, bow design, and exquisite fabric make it easy for you to achieve your ideal look, and the lightweight weight of 30g will not cause any burden to you.

✅【Satin Material】This hair bows is made of high-quality satin fabric and metal hair clip, with a soft texture, comfortable touch, and not easy to wrinkle. The black hair bow is sturdy and durable, not easy to fade. The combination of the two high-quality materials greatly extends the service life of the bow hair clip.

✅【Long Ribbon Design】The hair bows for girls design is simple and fashionable, with a bow as the main body and a long ribbon, flowing and graceful, creating a gentle and elegant atmosphere, suitable for various hairstyles and occasions.

✅【Easy to Use】This bows for hair is designed to be simple, easy to open and close, and can be used smoothly with just one press and release. The spring hair clip has strong grip, which can effectively fix your hair and maintain your style for a long time without falling off.

✅【Widely Used】The bow barrettes is simple and fashionable, very versatile, suitable for various occasions, perfect for daily wear, and can also be given as a gift for birthdays, Valentine's Day, Christmas, Thanksgiving, Children's Day, Halloween, Easter and other holidays to friends and family.
